zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe於1145年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf35歲，母親Joan verch Genillin16歲。他於1196年與Lleucu verch Gruffudd在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe于1145年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf35岁，母亲Joan verch Genillin16岁。他于1196年与Lleucu verch Gruffudd在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe was born in 1145, in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, was 35 and his mother, Joan verch Genillin, was 16. He married Lleucu verch Gruffudd in 1196, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe est né en 1145, à Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan verch Genillin, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lleucu verch Gruffudd en 1196, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe 1145 in Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf 35 und seine Mutter Joan verch Genillin 16. Er hat 1196 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Lleucu verch Gruffudd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe è nato il nel 1145 nel Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan verch Genillin, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lleucu verch Gruffudd nel 1196, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffeが1145年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyfは35歳，母Joan verch Genillinは16歳であった。1196年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLleucu verch Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe(이)가 1145년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan verch Genillin(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1196년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Lleucu verch Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe nasceu em 1145, em Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch Genillin, tinha 16 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe родился в 1145 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan verch Genillin, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lleucu verch Gruffudd в 1196 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe nació en 1145, en Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewelyn ap Moreiddig Warwyn of Cantref Selyf, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan verch Genillin, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lleucu verch Gruffudd en 1196, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
